description: ROUND 5 - The Reflection Loop Never Actually Improves Anything: The reflector generates proposals but nothing feeds real iteration data IN, reflections.jsonl is never read by subsequent iterations, evolution proposals are never auto-applied. Create a feedback_loop.py that closes the loop: reads iteration data, calls reflector, auto-applies confident proposals via evolution engine.
steps: Create kernel/feedback_loop.py with FeedbackLoop class: __init__(self, memory_dir, reflector, evolution_engine, metrics), run_cycle(iteration_data: dict) -> dict that: (1) calls reflector.analyze_iteration(iteration_data) and records reflection, (2) reads recent reflections from reflections.jsonl (last 10), (3) calls reflector.propose_evolution(reflections), (4) for proposals with confidence_score > threshold (default 0.7), calls evolution_engine.apply_change(), (5) tracks what was applied in evolution/history.jsonl, (6) returns summary dict with proposals_generated, proposals_applied, proposals_skipped

Add apply_if_confident(proposals: list, threshold: float = 0.7) -> list[dict] method to EvolutionEngine that filters proposals by confidence and applies those above threshold, returning list of applied changes

Update runner.py Mode 3: after each successful iteration (node transition), create iteration_data dict from the execution (node, result=success/failure, errors, duration) and call FeedbackLoop.run_cycle(iteration_data). Import FeedbackLoop.
Update context_assembler.py: add a section === EVOLUTION HISTORY === that reads the last 5 entries from evolution/history.jsonl and includes them so the AI knows what recently changed
Update kernel/prompts/reflector.md to explicitly state: 'Read memory/reflections.jsonl for recent reflections from prior iterations. Build on prior learnings. Reference specific entries.'
Make reflections.jsonl readable by the context_assembler: add a section === RECENT REFLECTIONS === with last 3 reflections so subsequent iterations have that context

Write tests in tests/test_feedback_loop.py: run_cycle produces reflection, proposals above threshold are applied, proposals below threshold are skipped, iteration_data flows correctly, history is written, multiple cycles accumulate reflections
acceptance_criteria: kernel/feedback_loop.py exists with FeedbackLoop class and run_cycle method
runner.py Mode 3 invokes the feedback loop after successful iterations
context_assembler includes evolution history and recent reflections in assembled prompts
findings: All 422 tests pass at 98.40% coverage. Created kernel/feedback_loop.py with FeedbackLoop class that ties reflector to evolution engine. Added apply_if_confident method to EvolutionEngine. Updated runner.py Mode 3 to call feedback loop on both success and failure. Updated context_assembler.py with evolution history and recent reflections sections. Updated reflector.md with prior reflections instruction. Added 17 new tests in tests/test_feedback_loop.py covering all acceptance criteria.
